{{Quote|That's right, sir! Murder ain't a crime -- it's a duty.|Nevo|<ref name="EOTE1" />}}
'''Nevo''' was a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] whose team slaughtered an entire crowd of innocent bystanders while seeking their target.

==Biography==
Nevo and his team were slated for execution, but their sentence was commuted by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. In hopes of capturing [[Abal Karda]] and his [[Selestrine|mysterious box]], Vader hired the services of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. Nevo and his companions were then hired to kill Fett and return the box to Vader. Nevo's companions were [[Fraal]], [[Gann (assassin)|Gann]], and [[Lumus]].<ref name="EOTE1" />

The gang were equipped with a fast ship and a tracking device, which they used to shadow Fett in his hunt for Karda. Unbeknown to Nevo's group, Fett was well aware that [[Slave I/Legends|Slave I]] was being followed, and cornered and killed Gaan on [[Starstation 12]] after learning the group's purpose. Undeterred by this setback, Nevo continued his pursuit and eventually caught up to Fett on [[Maryx Minor/Legends|Maryx Minor]], where he and his entire group were killed by the infamous [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].<ref name="EOTE1" />
